name: @galerina/tri-regex
description: Ternary streaming pattern matching — ReDoS-immune by construction. Non-backtracking automaton, compile-time cost certificate, fail-closed SECURITY_VETO on uncertifiable patterns, three-valued streaming verdicts (+1 match / 0 indeterminate / -1 refuse) with fail-closed collapse at end-of-stream.
author: TritHypha <hello@trithypha.dev>
